subcodes.first_line: O exalted Branch! In this moment when, from the sorrows at the martyrs' oppression, such a fire of longing doth burn in this heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع در ایندم که از احزان مظلومیت شهداء چنان آتش حسرتی در دل این
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @growth of the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @business; financial; property matters
